NAVAREA XIX 69/23
 NORWEGIAN SEA.
 LUNCH OPERATION. DANGER AREAS.
 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATION IN THE PERIOD 06 JUNE 2023 1900 UTC  TO 11 JUNE 2023 2400 UTC.
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA
 70-23.0N 004-10.0E
 68-30.0N 005-42.0E
 68-18.0N 008-55.0E
 68-31.0N 011-12.0E
 69-42.0N 015-37.0E
 70-39.0N 016-44.0E
 72-26.0N 014-07.0E
 72-34.0N 009-53.0E
 70-23.0N 004-10.0E
 NOTE: DURING THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PERIODS, MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO 
 AVOID THE NOTFIED DANGER AREAS, OR TO CONTACT ANDOYA SPACCE FOR COORDINATION. 
 THE OPERATION CENTER CAN BE REACHED BY TELEPHONE +47 76144582 ALTERNATIVE +47 90565430 OR BY MARITIME
 VHF CHANNEL 16 AND 14
